headline: How The FactSet (FDS) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Competition And Lower Street Targets
summary: FactSet Research Systems is back in focus after the modeled fair value was reset from about US$300.24 to roughly US$280.06, signaling a more restrained view of potential upside. That shift lines up with Street research that clusters around lower price targets and more cautious ratings, even as a few analysts still see room for the shares above the current consolidated target. As you read on, you will see what is driving the split views and how to keep track of the evolving FactSet story. Stay...
